_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

artifact_notes.CLAUDE.md: The system-update-notice rule: always offer the defer/skip choices, and run the update commands for the operator after their yes (resolving the tool's full path).
artifact_notes.wizard/skills/check-for-updates.md: Keeps offering the remind-later/skip/not-now choices for an update and, once you approve, runs the update for you -- you never type a command.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Preview read-only: wizard self-upgrade --to v0.6.7 --plan-only. 2. Review the preview, then the assistant runs the apply command it prints (--expect-commit pins exactly the previewed version). 3. A backup is taken first; your own data, rules, credentials, and logs are never touched.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.6 (or any version in the supported range). A backup is taken automatically.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.7/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.6.
migrations.notes: Operating-layer update-flow fix to v0.6.7. Operating-layer update-flow fix: when an update is available the system keeps offering the remind-me-later / skip-this-version / not-now choices (even when the operator prefers a single next step), and once the operator approves, the assistant RUNS the update commands itself -- the operator never has to type a terminal command -- resolving the update tool's full path so the command can't fail with 'command not found'. No new capabilities; foundation documents and schema are byte-identical to v0.6.6.

No new capabilities; foundation documents and schema are byte-identical to v0.6.6. Combined jump from v0.6.5 straight to v0.6.7: also delivers every operating-layer change in the versions between v0.6.5 and v0.6.7.
